hooks.command: cmux_cli="${CMUX_BUNDLED_CLI_PATH:-}"; if [ -z "$cmux_cli" ] || [ ! -x "$cmux_cli" ]; then cmux_cli="$(command -v cmux 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && [ -n "$cmux_cli" ]; then { if [ -n "${CMUX_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then "$cmux_cli" --socket "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" hooks gemini stop; else "$cmux_cli" hooks gemini stop; fi; } || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmux_cli="${CMUX_BUNDLED_CLI_PATH:-}"; if [ -z "$cmux_cli" ] || [ ! -x "$cmux_cli" ]; then cmux_cli="$(command -v cmux 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && [ -n "$cmux_cli" ]; then { if [ -n "${CMUX_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then "$cmux_cli" --socket "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" hooks gemini prompt-submit; else "$cmux_cli" hooks gemini prompt-submit; fi; } || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmux_cli="${CMUX_BUNDLED_CLI_PATH:-}"; if [ -z "$cmux_cli" ] || [ ! -x "$cmux_cli" ]; then cmux_cli="$(command -v cmux 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && [ -n "$cmux_cli" ]; then { if [ -n "${CMUX_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then "$cmux_cli" --socket "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" hooks feed --source gemini --event PreToolUse; else "$cmux_cli" hooks feed --source gemini --event PreToolUse; fi; } || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmux_cli="${CMUX_BUNDLED_CLI_PATH:-}"; if [ -z "$cmux_cli" ] || [ ! -x "$cmux_cli" ]; then cmux_cli="$(command -v cmux 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && [ -n "$cmux_cli" ]; then { if [ -n "${CMUX_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then "$cmux_cli" --socket "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" hooks gemini session-end; else "$cmux_cli" hooks gemini session-end; fi; } || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmux_cli="${CMUX_BUNDLED_CLI_PATH:-}"; if [ -z "$cmux_cli" ] || [ ! -x "$cmux_cli" ]; then cmux_cli="$(command -v cmux 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && [ -n "$cmux_cli" ]; then { if [ -n "${CMUX_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then "$cmux_cli" --socket "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" hooks gemini session-start; else "$cmux_cli" hooks gemini session-start; fi; } || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi
